listing_defaults.title: Listing Defaults
listing_defaults.intro: Set defaults here and new listings will inherit them. Each listing has a single "Use defaults" switch — while it is on, the fields you set a default for are hidden on that listing's form and follow the values below. Change a default here and every listing using defaults updates automatically. Leave a field as "No default" to keep deciding it per listing.
listing_defaults.days_enable: Set a default for bookable days
listing_defaults.days_required: Choose at least one bookable day, or turn the bookable-days default off.
listing_defaults.error.number: Enter a whole number of 0 or more for "{label}", or leave it blank.
listing_defaults.error.duration: Booking duration must be a whole number between 1 and {max}.
listing_defaults.field.uses_logistics.hi: Whether new listings are handled by a logistics agent (drop-off and collection).
listing_defaults.field.bookable_days.hin: The days of the week daily listings can be booked on.
listing_defaults.field.minimum_days_befo: Minimum days ahead a daily booking must be made.
listing_defaults.field.maximum_days_afte: How far ahead a daily booking can be made.
listing_defaults.field.duration_days.hin: Default number of days each daily booking covers.
listing_defaults.field.customisable_days: Whether visitors may choose their own booking length.
listing_defaults.field.webhook_url.label: Webhook URL
listing_defaults.field.webhook_url.hint: A URL that receives a POST when a booking is made.
listing_defaults.field.thank_you_url.hin: Where buyers are redirected after a successful purchase.
listing_defaults.use_defaults_hint: Inherit the fields you've set defaults for. Turn this off to edit them on this listing.
